meaning: n.乐章结尾部,完结部,终结句
examples: Then he uttered his fatal coda: “We’re still dancing.”
The first-generation Coda car looks like a generic, midsize Asian sedan.
The Coda file system was the first attempt at improving the original AFS.
The CODA Sedan can also be charged for free at most public charging stations.
Techs and Greens will probably be attracted to the CODA Sedan, at least on paper.
